'''''SHADIS Magazine'' 27''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[July]]/[[August]] of [[1996]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called ''[[Corellian Smuggler]]'', and was written by [[Dan Verssen]].
